slides.title: The paradox
slides.body: Both sides simultaneously claim their own proposals are reasonable while categorically rejecting the other's, revealing a framing deadlock where convergence appears impossible.

slides.title: Silence as data
slides.body: `brazil` didn't cover this. They covered Saudi Arabia's military response and regional pressure (Rubio's diplomacy, MbS's airspace denial) — tactical statecraft rather than proposal content. instead.
